channel.title: Notice board | Unimi
channel.description: General notice board of the University of Milan "La Statale"

item.title: Call for the B1 Preliminary (PET) exam on 22 + 24 June 2026 - SOLD OUT
item.description: The call is open to register for the digital Cambridge English B1 Preliminary (PET) exam scheduled on 22 + 24 June 2026.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for the B2 First (FCE) exam on 22 + 24 June 2026 - SOLD OUT
item.description: The call is open to register for the digital Cambridge English B2 First (FCE) exam scheduled on 22 + 24 June 2026.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for the C2 Proficiency (CPE) exam on 22 + 25 June 2026
item.description: The call is open to register for the digital Cambridge English C2 Proficiency (CPE) exam scheduled on 22 + 25 June 2026.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for admissions to Collegio di Milano - a. y. 2026-2027
Special “Other Foreign Languages” Test Session for soon-to-be graduates in the Summer Session
item.description: The special “Other Foreign Languages” Test Session is for soon-to-be graduates in the Summer Session. For further information please refer to the attached file.%0A %0A%0A📄 Avviso Sessione Laureandi_Sessione Estiva_2526_ENG

item.title: Extended weekend opening hours at the BICF Library
item.description: From Saturday, 7 February 2026, the Biology, Chemistry, Physics, and Computer Sciences Library (BICF) will extend its weekend opening hours: Saturday and Sunday, 9-20.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it

item.title: University Library Service – spring course calendar 2026
item.description: The list of courses offered by the University Library Service in spring 2026 is now online. These courses focus on the use of databases, and are open to the entire University community.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it
